understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each KA59 level by moving and (when multiple exist) selecting the different controllable pieces and positioning them so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time, which triggers WIN and lets you progress through all levels until the final win.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) attempt to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) per move; moves can be blocked by walls/boundaries or certain objects, and the movement_blocked hints only indicate adjacency and do not guarantee failure. Some objects are pushable blocks: if a block is directly adjacent in the direction of travel and the space beyond allows, it can be pushed along with the player’s move; otherwise the move fails. Levels can include multiple selectable pieces; CLICK with a target_position matching an on-screen selectable’s pixel coordinates switches control to that piece, and winning requires coordinating all selectables to cover all '+' goals simultaneously within the limited step budget.
